description:
Render markdown headings, code blocks, tables, checkboxes, and links directly in the buffer with concealment and highlights. More useful day-to-day than external preview tools (glow.nvim, markdown-preview.nvim).

New file: `home-modules/editors/neovim/ui/render-markdown.nix` or `utility/render-markdown.nix`
title: Add render-markdown.nvim
